subject: accomplishments for the first six months

emails.subject: RE: Accomplishments for the first six months
emails.subject_base: Accomplishments for the first six months
emails.body: RE: Accomplishments for the first six months Is "not going to AEP" considered an accomplishment? By the way, most of the people who could give performance feedback on me are leaving or have left the company. I'm sure they thought that I was superior though. D To: Superty, Robert; Farmer, Daren J.; Wynne, Rita; McClure, Mark; Bussell l, Kathryn

emails.subject: RE: Accomplishments for the first six months
emails.subject_base: Accomplishments for the first six months
emails.body: Yes, It is a great accomplishment. Please don't go any time soon. talk to you later. bob To: Hall, Bob M
